## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss SEO performance, content updates, and ongoing projects for Ramp and GrowthX collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Slight increases in sessions and views across various content categories, but no significant changes](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Ongoing issues with HTML/JSON access in CMS editing, blocking table creation](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [New vendor pages and tuning pages showing steady performance, with some unexpected successes](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Publishing automation and content refreshes are in progress, with new categories added for production](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Overview

  - [Slight increase in sessions and views across categories (credit cards, per diem, expense)](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [GSC data revealed pages with significant click losses, some falling out of top 10 rankings](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [CTR drops observed, likely due to AI overviews rollout (not considered a major concern)](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Expense category showing steady decline, with most pages losing \>50% clicks quarterly](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Algorithm update impact suspected, limited actionable steps available](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)

### Tuning Pages Performance

  - [Minor drop in sessions, but not significant in absolute terms](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Quarterly basis shows increased clicks for most pages](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Net Present Value block underperforming, possibly due to competition with finance-focused sites](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Treasury pages performing better than expected, despite low SEMrush volumes](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Potential for new programmatic cluster based on treasury content success](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Vendor Pages Update

  - [Steady performance without massive increases in sessions or views](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Performance lagging expectations, but team waiting to see if next batch compounds results](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)

### Ongoing Projects and Tasks

  - [Publishing automation in progress, update expected early next week](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Alternatives pages being reviewed by the team](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Content refreshes approved and ready for implementation](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [HTML/JSON access in CMS editing still problematic, blocking table creation](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
  - [New categories added for production by Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=378.0)

### Content Publishing Process

  - [Matt to flag content as "add to CMS" when review is complete](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Discussion on selecting authors and publishing teams in Sanity](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Existing authors to be maintained for blog refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and start publishing vendor pages, with deadlines to be communicated to Victoria](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [Schedule and begin work on newly added production categories](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Vivek/Nika to update team on publishing and scheduling progress](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=554.0)
  - [Matt to update status for tuning pages/blog refreshes in the sheet](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Continue monitoring performance of vendor and tuning pages](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [Web engineering team to address ongoing CMS editing issues, particularly table creation](https://fathom.video/share/5ReTQwVguvwbsW35VQZwbJ7yf8rkMqN9?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)
